problem id: 55e23d08
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(1) XOR SHR(5)

examples:
  01111101 -> 11111001
  01011110 -> 10111110
  00010111 -> 00101110
  11100000 -> 11000111
  00100100 -> 01001001
  11011001 -> 10110100
  01110111 -> 11101101
  10011110 -> 00111000
  10101000 -> 01010101

query: 11101011
predicted answer: 11010001
